overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character exploring a rustic log cabin in a winter setting. The character enters the dimly lit wooden structure, examines animal pelts hanging near a campfire, and loots various items including cigarettes, bourbon, and ammunition from containers.

scene_state.functional_zone: log cabin interior with central campfire

events.description: character enters the dark log cabin from the snowy exterior

agents.ego_description: walking into the dimly lit cabin and surveying the rustic interior with campfire and hanging pelts

entered.detail: rough hewn horizontal log walls with visible chinking between logs
thick horizontal logs supporting the roof structure
three dark fur pelts suspended from a horizontal pole on the wall
small burning fire with stones arranged around the pit
black cast iron pot suspended over the campfire on a tripod

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow log cabin from the snowy exterior, revealing a dimly lit interior with rough wooden walls. A campfire burns in the center with a cooking pot suspended over it, while animal pelts hang on the left wall. Natural light filters through gaps in the logs and a small window.

scene_state.functional_zone: cabin corner with supply table and bottles

events.description: character picks up premium cigarettes from the wooden table
character picks up kentucky bourbon from the table

agents.ego_description: approaching a wooden table and looting supplies including a pack of cigarettes and a bottle of bourbon

entered.detail: rustic wooden table with various supplies scattered on the surface
several glass bottles including whiskey and other provisions
simple wooden chair positioned next to the table

segments.scene_description: The character moves to a corner of the cabin where a wooden table holds various supplies. After the campfire recedes into the background, the character interacts with items on the table, picking up premium cigarettes and a bottle of Kentucky bourbon while a wooden chair stands nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: cabin sleeping area with bed and storage

events.description: character opens a metal lock box beside the bed
character inspects a document or map found inside the lock box

agents.ego_description: kneeling beside a bed to open a lock box, examining a document inside, and collecting revolver cartridges

entered.detail: wooden frame bed with worn mattress, blanket, and debris underneath
small metal lock box on the floor containing ammunition and documents
paper document or treasure map found inside the opened lock box

segments.scene_description: Moving to the sleeping area of the cabin, the character approaches a simple bed with a metal lock box beside it. The character opens the box, inspects a document or map found inside, and collects revolver cartridges while the previous table area falls behind. The cabin door becomes visible in the background as the character finishes looting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the snowy outdoors into the intimate, cluttered interior of a rustic log cabin. It begins as the character steps from the bright winter exterior into a dimly lit room where a central campfire burns beneath a suspended cooking pot and animal pelts hang from rough wooden walls. As the camera moves deeper into the cabin, the fire recedes into the background to reveal a wooden table in the corner, where the character collects premium cigarettes and a bottle of Kentucky bourbon. The scene then shifts toward the sleeping area, gliding past a wooden chair to focus on a metal lock box beside a simple bed. Finally, the character inspects a document and gathers revolver cartridges from the box while the cabin door becomes visible in the distance behind them.
